text:
Created attachment 205106
Patch to update devel/mill to version 0.4.1

Hi,

I've created a patch to update the devel/mill port to the latest version (0.4.1).

Kind regards,

Jens

ChangeLog
---------

- Explicitly use value for comparison
- Allow configuration of JSEnv used for Scala.js tests and runs (#628)
- more fixes for scalajs env
